nasb.text: Isaac breathed his last and died and was gathered to his people, an old man of ripe age; and his sons Esau and Jacob buried him.

esv.text: And Isaac breathed his last, and he died and was gathered to his people, old and full of days. And his sons Esau and Jacob buried him.

cnv.text: 以撒年紀老邁，享盡天年，就氣絕而死，歸到他的親族那裡去了；他兒子以掃和雅各把他葬了。

ccb.text: 年纪老迈，寿终正寝。他的儿子以扫和雅各把他安葬了。

csbs.text: 以撒年纪老迈，尽享天年，气绝而死，归到他的先人那里。他的儿子以扫和雅各把他埋葬了。
